experiences.title: Jarvis - Virtual Assistant
experiences.description: Developed a voice-controlled virtual assistant named Jarvis using Python. Implemented voice command recognition and automation features including opening applications, web searching, telling time, and other helpful functions through natural voice commands.

experiences.title: B.Tech in Computer Science
experiences.description: Currently pursuing B.Tech in CSE with focus on programming, data structures, algorithms, and software development fundamentals.

experiences.title: Google Cloud Study Jams
experiences.description: Participated in Google Cloud Study Jams to learn about cloud computing and Google Cloud Platform services.
